title: Josh Ling
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Josh Ling''' is an author who has written a variety of ''[[Star Wars]]'' literature such as the collector's lists for the [[The Topps Company, Inc.|Topps]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]'' magazine, as well as updates for ''[[Tomart's Worldwide Price Guide to Star Wars Collectibles]]''. He contributed to ''[[Anakin Skywalker: The Story of Darth Vader]]'' along with [[Daniel Wallace]], which was published by [[Chronicle Books]] in [[1998]] and co-wrote two books in the [[Star Wars Masterpiece Edition]] series: ''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'' with Daniel Wallace and ''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]'' with [[Ryder Windham]], which were published by Chronicle Books in [[1999]] and 2000, respectively.

Josh was also Steve Sansweet's first archivist and collections manager beginning in 1993 through 2000. Josh helped start the cataloging process of Steve's massive collection and helped Steve relocate from Los Angeles to Petaluma in 1998. 

He lives in Los Angeles.

{{Author-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*''[[Anakin Skywalker: The Story of Darth Vader]]'' Co-wrote with [[Daniel Wallace]] (1998)
*''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]'' Co-wrote with [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] (1999)
*''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]'' Co-wrote with [[Daniel Wallace]] (1999)
*''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]'' Co-wrote with [[Ryder Windham]] (2000)
